{{CargoOrgan
|name=Hand of Silver
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10825
|idx=26
|description=A prosthetic forged from sacred silver, engraved with verses of holy scripture. Its original owner, a Seventh-Rank Angel, fought the Sword God for three days and nights before losing an arm—and forged this divine replacement.
|skill=
|hp=904
|def=85
|atk=156
|rush=86
|gene1=In explorations, {race} HP +200
|gene2=During exploration, CRIT DMG +5%
|gene3=The Time Machine: +3% chance to drop
Time Chests
|gene7=During exploration, CRIT DMG +5% (Awakened)
|}}
